summary: First test run - full backend + frontend testing. All critical flows working. 15/15 backend tests passed. UI fully functional.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='xp-bar-container' is inside XpBar sub-component but data-testid='level-card' exists at line 118. Both are present in code but xp-bar-container may be harder to target from parent context.

issues: Camera error shown correctly in headless env ('Error de cámara - No se encontró ninguna cámara'). Expected behavior in non-camera environment.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 878 lines - consider splitting into routers/modules for maintainability
CORS is set to allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True - this is a security concern for production
No rate limiting or brute force protection on auth endpoints (login/register)
test_credentials: test@cibermedida.es / Test2024! (working). newuser@test.es / TestNew2024! (registered via test)
seed_data_creation: 40 exercises seeded in MongoDB at startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows tested: landing (hero+CTAs), auth modal (register+login), dashboard (level/XP/sessions), exercises (40 cards, category tabs, difficulty filter, modal with Entrenar ahora), train room (camera panel+metrics+start btn - camera error expected in headless), progress (empty state), profile (name+job profile form), navbar (5 nav links + level badge + logout). Logout redirects to landing. All 15 backend APIs pass. Vision metrics in Train.js are MOCKED/simulated.
mocked_apis: Vision metrics (MediaPipe) are simulated/random values from frontend Train.js. Claude report generation uses real Anthropic API.
